title: Full-Scale Amazon PRMP Validation (50K reviews, 4 variants × 5 seeds × 200 epochs)
summary: Demonstrates Predictive Residual Message Passing (PRMP) on Amazon Video Games review-rating regression. The notebook trains 4 heterogeneous GNN variants (Standard, PRMP, Wide parameter-matched control, AuxMLP control) with 5 seeds on 75 curated test examples reconstructed from the full-scale experiment output (50K reviews). It computes Cohen's d effect sizes between variants and visualizes: (1) full-scale MAE comparison across variants, (2) effect size bar chart showing PRMP's d=-0.755 persists at scale, and (3) prediction vs actual scatter plot. Training completes in ~26s with the original hyperparameters (hidden_dim=128, max_epochs=200, patience=20). Data loaded from GitHub URL with local fallback.
